actions.action: Fetch the Latest News from APIs
actions.fallback_action: If fetching news from APIs fails in the future, try again after a few minutes. If it still fails, manually review and update the API keys and endpoints.

recipe.steps: Retrieve the latest news for various categories including general news, sports, business & finance, weather, breaking news, and geopolitics using the specified API endpoints.
recipe.generalized_functions:
import requests

# Define API endpoints and perform the requests
endpoints = {
    "General News": "http://newsapi.org/v2/top-headlines?country=us&apiKey=API_KEY",
    "Business & Finance": "https://finnhub.io/api/v1/news?category=general&token=API_KEY",
    "Sports": "https://www.thesportsdb.com/api/v1/json/3/searchteams.php?t=TEAM_NAME",
    "Weather": "https://api.openweathermap.org/data/2.5/weather?q=CITY_NAME&appid=API_KEY",
    "Breaking News": "https://eventregistry.org/api/v1/article/getArticles?keyword=breaking%20news&apiKey=API_KEY",
    "Geopolitics": "https://newsapi.org/v2/top-headlines?country=us&apiKey=API_KEY"
}

news_data = {}

for category, url in endpoints.items():
    response = requests.get(url)
    news_data[category] = response.json()

print(news_data)

recipe.steps: Store the fetched news data in memory for future use.
Confirm the completion of the action with StatusVerifier.

actions.fallback_action: If the assignment of AI avatars per genre fails in the future, reassess the genres and avatars mapping and ensure API availability.

recipe.steps: Fetch avatars from the provided URL using the user_id.
recipe.generalized_functions:
import requests

# Fetch avatars using user_id
user_id = 'PLACEHOLDER_FOR_USER_ID'
url = f'https://mailer.hertzai.com/all_teacher_only_avatars_id_user_id?user_id={user_id}'
response = requests.get(url)
avatars_data = response.json()

print(avatars_data)
